creator: petef@databits.net
text:
Bug confirmed.

It looks like this is a problem with the pgp distribution.  In
pgp50i/src/apps/pgp/Makefile.in on line 30:

             $(LN_S) pgp pgp_old                         \

This is easily fixed, as we modify that Makefile anyway with
files/patch-ac.



--- patch-ac.old        Sat Jan 20 23:02:57 2001
+++ files/patch-ac      Sat Jan 20 23:03:23 2001
@@ -26,5 +26,5 @@
 +          $(LN_S) $(INSTPGP) pgpe;                    \
 +          $(LN_S) $(INSTPGP) pgps;                    \
 +          $(LN_S) $(INSTPGP) pgpv;                    \
-+          $(LN_S) $(INSTPGP) pgp_old                  \
++          $(LN_S) $(INSTPGP) pgpo                     \
        )

--- pkg-plist.old       Sat Jan 20 23:01:02 2001
+++ pkg-plist   Sat Jan 20 23:11:46 2001
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
 @exec ln -fs %D/%F %B/pgpe
 @exec ln -fs %D/%F %B/pgps
 @exec ln -fs %D/%F %B/pgpv
-@exec ln -fs %D/%F %B/pgp_old
+@exec ln -fs %D/%F %B/pgpo
 @unexec rm %B/pgpe
 @unexec rm %B/pgps
 @unexec rm %B/pgpv
-@unexec rm %B/pgp_old
+@unexec rm %B/pgpo
 bin/pgpk
 lib/libbn.a
 lib/libpgp.a
